Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: E85 fuel promises high-octane performance for almost any engine. We put it to the test.
Video.title: High Compression SBC on E85

Video.summary: Today we’ll show you the 5 most common reasons your engine won’t start...and how to fix it!
Video.title: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Image.alt: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Team creates over-the-top street/strip pickup wedging a nitrous-powered 427 big block into a compact S10.
Video.title: Lime Dime: 427 Big Block

Video.summary: How-to bolt on 150 HP with a wet-nitrous system, install a bed-mounted radiator and index J-wire spark plugs.
Video.title: Lime Dime: More Power

Video.summary: After 23 years in retirement, original BigFoot monster truck comes alive.
Video.title: BigFoot Lives

Video.summary: Team dials in Lime Dime drag truck at the strip.
Video.title: Race Track Tuning

Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: We revive a 505ci RB Mopar with upgrades and a fresh look, unleashing more power for a hotrod build.
Video.title: 505ci Monster Mopar

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Our 460 Big Block Ford is back! We upgrade it with a weight saving, better flowing induction.
Video.title: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We dyno test a custom-built 5.3 LS crate engine and talk in-depth about the importance of quality fasteners.
Video.title: Crate Horsepower

Video.summary: We put our past engine builds to the test now that they have been installed in awesome hot rods!
Video.title: Chassis Dyno Mania

Video.summary: Engine Power gets the honor of rebuilding the 640 inch blown nitrous injected V8.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 1

Video.summary: The team visits Kaase Racing to machine the 429 inch Ford big block from the first monster truck, Big Foot #1.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 2

Video.summary: Mike and Pat assemble and dyno tune massive 640 cubic inch tri-power 429 Ford with 871 blower and nitrous.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 3

Video.summary: We taking a sleek and sassy ‘62 Chevy Nova muscle car and turn it into a major track beast.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova
Pro Street or No Street Nova
Pro Street or No Street Nova

Video.summary: The Carcass crew found a 2012 Jeep JK at an auction and just had to buy it.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 1: Suspension Overhaul

Video.summary: The guys put the final touches on the Jeep JK, adding a new bumper and winch.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 2: Trail Accessories

Video.summary: A Chevy Trailblazer SUV may not be the first thing you think of for drifting, but now it won’t be your last.
Video.title: Drifting Chevy Trailblazer

Video.summary: We transform a Chevy C-1500 into a pro-touring sport truck.
Video.title: Pro Touring Sport Truck

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: The Carcass crew invites a few friends out for a day on the trails.
Video.title: Off-Road Excursion

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: The Abandoned Chevy Silverado project is back for mild performance upgrades to the engine.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: While freshening up the brakes on our ’96 Chevy Tahoe, we noticed that we have a sloppy rear end.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.
Video.title: Beetle to BajAwesome

Video.summary: We add a custom fit roll cage, fabricated louvers, and a bunch of style points to this baja style bug.
Video.title: Baja Makeover

Video.summary: Baja Style bug gets a 80's retro style paint job to go along with a long travel suspension.
Video.title: Retro Baja Bug

Video.summary: We take a 3 decade old military M530C fire truck, gut it, and turn it into a bobbed deuce.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part I

Video.summary: Our military deuce is turned into a customized 4x4 truck with improved suspension and load capacity.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part II
